all_candidates.topic: Should social media platforms be solely responsible for child safety?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Indian government stated on July 14, 2026, that social media platforms must follow SOPs on child abuse content.

all_candidates.topic: Should board marks get 50% weightage for NEET/JEE admissions?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A proposal to allocate 50% weightage to Class 12 board marks for NEET and JEE admissions was debated on July 4, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should India delay E25 petrol rollout due to public concerns?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Centre is likely to postpone the introduction of E25 petrol due to motorist complaints and engine damage concerns, as reported on July 7, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven layoffs in Indian IT firms justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 9, 2026, indicate India's IT sector could lose up to 35,000 jobs this year due to AI adoption and restructuring.

all_candidates.topic: Is NTA's OMR challenge window sufficient for NEET fairness?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The NTA opened the NEET UG 2026 re-exam OMR challenge window from July 13 to July 15, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should banks face stricter penalties for mis-selling financial products?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The RBI rolled out a new mis-selling protection framework for bank customers, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should social media AI features always prioritize user privacy?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Meta recently scrapped an AI image feature days after launch following privacy backlash, as mentioned on July 13, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the recent passport fee hike in India justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Passport fees in India increased by as much as 67% effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should more Indian cities revive 24x7 public transport?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The West Bengal government announced on July 13, 2026, its plan to revive night bus services in Kolkata to support a 24x7 economy.

all_candidates.topic: Does the new EPF Scheme 2026 truly benefit employees?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's Ministry of Labour and Employment notified the Employees' Provident Funds Scheme, 2026, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Will increased railway penalties improve passenger conduct?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Changes to the Railway Act, effective July 2026, introduce increased penalties for various offences.

all_candidates.topic: Should Indian companies match salaries for returning H-1B workers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A July 9, 2026, report states laid-off H-1B workers returning to India are finding jobs but often at a fraction of their former US salaries.

all_candidates.topic: Should government regulate usernames on digital platforms like WhatsApp?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 13, 2026, news reported WhatsApp usernames are under review as the Centre pushes for uniform rules across digital platforms.

all_candidates.topic: Should shared autos and e-vehicles be formally legalized nationwide?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's Economic Survey 2025-26, as discussed on July 8, 2026, recommends formally legalizing shared autos, e-vehicles, and buses for last-mile connectivity.

all_candidates.topic: Are NCERT textbook revisions truly promoting civic values?
all_candidates.news_anchor: NCERT released a revised Class 8 social science textbook on July 8, 2026, removing controversial sections and introducing updated content.

all_candidates.topic: Is AI integration key to India's cyber security strategy?
all_candidates.news_anchor: MeitY Secretary S. Krishnan stated on July 13, 2026, that India needs to build cyber-resilient systems, highlighting AI's role.

all_candidates.topic: Will AI recruitment tools improve hiring fairness in India?
all_candidates.news_anchor: DeepTalent Technologies launched EzRecruit.ai on July 11, 2026, an AI-powered operating system for India's recruitment industry.

all_candidates.topic: Will automatic GST ITC reporting in GSTR-3B reduce fraud?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From the July 2026 tax period, manual Input Tax Credit (ITC) adjustments in GSTR-3B will end, making reporting system-driven, as reported on July 9, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the new GST AATO amendment window beneficial for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GST Annual Aggregate Turnover (AATO) amendment window for FY 2025-26 opened on July 1, 2026, with an upgraded functionality rolling out.

all_candidates.topic: Should India prioritize public AI infrastructure over private development?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw stated on July 12, 2026, that India will augment its computing capacity to support the growing AI ecosystem.
